news.title:
RBL Bank sees breakout with higher highs and lows; RSI above 50.
MACD bullish crossover with supportive volume indicates positive momentum.
news.summary:
RBL Bank sees breakout with higher highs and lows; RSI above 50.
MACD bullish crossover with supportive volume indicates positive momentum.

news.title:
RBL Bank's FY26 business surpassed ₹2.5L Cr; deposits rose 25% YoY to ₹1.39L Cr.
Advances grew 22% to ₹1.15L Cr, LCR stood at 130%, and JLG collections reached 99.7%.
news.summary:
RBL Bank's FY26 business surpassed ₹2.5L Cr; deposits rose 25% YoY to ₹1.39L Cr.
Advances grew 22% to ₹1.15L Cr, LCR stood at 130%, and JLG collections reached 99.7%.

news.title:
RBL Bank's gross advances rose to ₹1.15T from ₹948B YoY.
Total deposits increased to ₹1.4T from ₹1.1T, showing strong growth.
news.summary:
RBL Bank's gross advances rose to ₹1.15T from ₹948B YoY.
Total deposits increased to ₹1.4T from ₹1.1T, showing strong growth.

news.title:
RBL Bank sees 11.3% rise in derivatives open interest, indicating active trading.
Despite higher activity, RBL Bank underperformed its sector and broader indices.
news.summary:
RBL Bank sees 11.3% rise in derivatives open interest, indicating active trading.
Despite higher activity, RBL Bank underperformed its sector and broader indices.

news.title:
RBI approves RBL Bank's deal with Emirates NDB, sources confirm.
RBL Bank's board is set to meet today regarding the deal.
news.summary:
RBI approves RBL Bank's deal with Emirates NDB, sources confirm.
RBL Bank's board is set to meet today regarding the deal.

news.title:
RBI approves Emirates NBD's 60% stake acquisition in RBL Bank for ₹26,850 crore.
Acquisition via preferential issue at ₹280/share; RBL Bank board meets today for disclosure.
news.summary:
RBI approves Emirates NBD's 60% stake acquisition in RBL Bank for ₹26,850 crore.
Acquisition via preferential issue at ₹280/share; RBL Bank board meets today for disclosure.

news.title:
RBL Bank secures RBI approval for its stake acquisition deal with Emirates NBD.
Sebi approval for the proposed deal is still awaited, per sources.
news.summary:
RBL Bank secures RBI approval for its stake acquisition deal with Emirates NBD.
Sebi approval for the proposed deal is still awaited, per sources.

news.title: RBL Bank gets RBI approval for partnership with Emirates NBD.
news.summary: RBL Bank gets RBI approval for partnership with Emirates NBD.

news.title:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.
news.summary:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.

news.title:
UAE Central Bank approves Emirates NBD's majority stake acquisition in RBL Bank.
Amalgamation of Emirates NBD's India operations into RBL Bank awaits regulatory approvals.
news.summary:
UAE Central Bank approves Emirates NBD's majority stake acquisition in RBL Bank.
Amalgamation of Emirates NBD's India operations into RBL Bank awaits regulatory approvals.

news.title:
RBL Bank faced a GST demand of ₹92 crore for FY20, later fully withdrawn.
The withdrawal, under Section 74 of Maharashtra GST Act, was disclosed per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
RBL Bank faced a GST demand of ₹92 crore for FY20, later fully withdrawn.
The withdrawal, under Section 74 of Maharashtra GST Act, was disclosed per SEBI norms.

news.title:
RBL Bank held analyst and investor meets on Mar 18, 2026, with firms like ICICI Securities and SBI Life.
No UPSI was shared; details hosted on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
RBL Bank held analyst and investor meets on Mar 18, 2026, with firms like ICICI Securities and SBI Life.
No UPSI was shared; details hosted on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
RBL Bank named collecting banker for XED IPO, first from GIFT IFSC.
BHIM Payments App appoints MS Dhoni as brand ambassador for growth focus.
news.summary:
RBL Bank named collecting banker for XED IPO, first from GIFT IFSC.
BHIM Payments App appoints MS Dhoni as brand ambassador for growth focus.

news.title:
Investec retains Buy on RBL Bank with TP ₹390, citing Emirates NBD deal closure by Jun-26.
RBL plans to expand branches to 1,000 by FY28, target 25%+ loan growth, ~10% ROE by FY29.
news.summary:
Investec retains Buy on RBL Bank with TP ₹390, citing Emirates NBD deal closure by Jun-26.
RBL plans to expand branches to 1,000 by FY28, target 25%+ loan growth, ~10% ROE by FY29.

news.title:
Emirates NBD affirms RBL Bank deal is on track despite geopolitical tensions, aiming for regulatory approvals in India and UAE.
Emirates NBD plans to acquire 60% of RBL via preferential shares and mandatory open offer; RBL closed 0.3% higher at ₹295.9 on NSE.
news.summary:
Emirates NBD affirms RBL Bank deal is on track despite geopolitical tensions, aiming for regulatory approvals in India and UAE.
Emirates NBD plans to acquire 60% of RBL via preferential shares and mandatory open offer; RBL closed 0.3% higher at ₹295.9 on NSE.

news.title:
Sunsure Energy secures ₹606 cr debt financing for renewable projects in Maharashtra and Uttar Pradesh.
Funding from Aseem Infra and RBL Bank boosts Sunsure's renewable energy portfolio expansion.
news.summary:
Sunsure Energy secures ₹606 cr debt financing for renewable projects in Maharashtra and Uttar Pradesh.
Funding from Aseem Infra and RBL Bank boosts Sunsure's renewable energy portfolio expansion.

news.title:
RBL Bank held investor meets on March 9, 2026, with no UPSI shared.
Meet details hosted on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
RBL Bank held investor meets on March 9, 2026, with no UPSI shared.
Meet details hosted on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
RBL Bank sees 10.7% rise in open interest despite weak price action.
Declining prices and volume hint at market positioning shifts among traders.
news.summary:
RBL Bank sees 10.7% rise in open interest despite weak price action.
Declining prices and volume hint at market positioning shifts among traders.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
RBL Bank shares rose 2% after RBI approved SBI Mutual Fund to increase its stake to 9.99%, up from 1.88%.
RBL posted 12% YoY deposit growth, 548% YoY net profit rise in Q3FY26, but provisions increased 28% QoQ, impacting profitability.
news.summary:
RBL Bank shares rose 2% after RBI approved SBI Mutual Fund to increase its stake to 9.99%, up from 1.88%.
RBL posted 12% YoY deposit growth, 548% YoY net profit rise in Q3FY26, but provisions increased 28% QoQ, impacting profitability.
